3277860.name: Solacinity
3277860.description:
No redemption. No surrender. No escape.

Lost in a mysterious digital world, join Adira in her adventure to face her fears and find a way home.

  • Adira's trusty Double Jump will help you cross large gaps, weave between spikes and climb tall cliffs! Plus, her hammer can pack a powerful punch!

  • Solacinity is packed full of useful gizmos to aid Adira in her journey. Restore your jumps mid-air with ReJump Orbs. Take advantage of Springs to launch yourself in certain directions. Face a giant number of other challenges too, like Electricity, Teleportals, and even your own memories!

  • Explore 8 unique chapters full of unique challenges like a brainwashed fighter or a changing climate!

  • Fall down a pit, or collide with Spikes or other obstacles? No worry! You'll be brought right back to the start of the current room.

  • Experience the expansive story of Adira and Solacinity's other wanderers throughout your adventure.

    Solacinity is awaiting your arrival...
3277860.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
